description_long: This is a single bed frame with a classic, vintage-inspired design, featuring a high, arched headboard and a lower, matching footboard. Both the headboard and footboard have decorative spindle posts at each corner and a woven cane or rattan panel inset, adding a touch of elegance and texture. The frame is constructed from wood and finished in a light, neutral color, giving it a refined and timeless appearance. The bed slats are visible, indicating that it is designed to support a mattress but does not currently have one in place. The legs are turned and slightly tapered, contributing to the traditional aesthetic. This bed would be suitable for placement in a residential or boutique urban setting, such as a bedroom or guest room.
description: A vintage-style single bed frame with a high, arched headboard and footboard, both featuring woven cane panels and decorative spindle posts. The frame is wooden, light-colored, and has visible slats for mattress support.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high, arched headboard with a woven cane panel and decorative posts, as well as the slatted base and lower footboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the slatted base, and the profile of both the headboard and footboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard with its woven cane panel and the symmetry of the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bed's length, slatted base, and the footboard's profile.
